record.field: modules = env['ir.module.module'].search([ ('name', 'in', [ 'contact_extension', 'access_roles', 'account_invoice_installments', 'installment_management_pro', 'installment_payment_extension', 'inventory_extension', 'invoice_installment_management', 'payment_term_installment_extension', 'pricelist_expression', 'product_extension', 'sales_order_extension', 'frtz_l10n', 'subscription_management', ]), ('state', 'in', ('installed', 'to upgrade')), ]) if not modules: raise UserError(_("None of the FRTZ suite modules are installed.")) action = modules.button_immediate_upgrade()
